This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Can set 'position-visibility' to the 'anchors-valid' keyword: anchors-valid
  Failed to execute 'set' on 'StylePropertyMap': Invalid type for property
[FAIL] Can set 'position-visibility' to the 'anchors-visible' keyword: anchors-visible
  assert_equals: expected "CSSKeywordValue" but got "CSSStyleValue"
[FAIL] Can set 'position-visibility' to the 'no-overflow' keyword: no-overflow
  assert_equals: expected "CSSKeywordValue" but got "CSSStyleValue"
[FAIL] 'position-visibility' does not support 'anchors-valid anchors-visible'
  assert_class_string: Unsupported value must be a CSSStyleValue and not one of its subclasses expected "[object CSSStyleValue]" but got "[object Undefined]"
[FAIL] 'position-visibility' does not support 'anchors-valid no-overflow'
  assert_class_string: Unsupported value must be a CSSStyleValue and not one of its subclasses expected "[object CSSStyleValue]" but got "[object Undefined]"
[FAIL] 'position-visibility' does not support 'anchors-valid anchors-visible no-overflow'
  assert_class_string: Unsupported value must be a CSSStyleValue and not one of its subclasses expected "[object CSSStyleValue]" but got "[object Undefined]"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
